/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HealthSync_ALSE.dir/HealthSync_ALSE_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HealthSync_ALSE.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HealthSync_ALSE.dir/src/DatabaseManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HealthSync_ALSE.dir/src/Login.cpp.o -o HealthSync_ALSE -F/usr/local/opt/qt@5/lib  /usr/local/opt/qt@5/lib/QtSql.framework/QtSql /usr/local/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCharts.framework/QtCharts /usr/local/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /usr/local/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /usr/local/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
